data.name: Foxgirl Trainer
data.detailed_description:
After defeating the demon king, you receive a curse that makes you get attacked by hordes of demon at night. You return to your home with your two loyal companions and keep away from civilization as you try to survive the horde. You'll need to gather resources, build up your defenses, and craft stronger items to have a chance at survival.

Chop trees, mine ores, hunt monsters and wildlife, scavenge, and explore various dungeons in the forest and defeat their bosses to earn crafting ingredients. These dungeons are dangerous and even contain puzzles.

The demon hordes also leave behind useful items if you manage to defeat them. Use them to defeat future hordes.

You and your two companions won't be enough to defeat the hordes that get stronger with each passing night. Fortunately, you'll meet Kyubi, a demon fox, that's looking for a mate. Train her to be your loyal companion as she'll be a powerful ally in your fight against the horde.

Engage in romance with the foxgirl as well as your two elf companions. This may not only advance the plot but also lead to steamy scenes and offer unique rewards to help you in combat.

There's also a town that you'll be able to visit. The townspeople will have quests and maybe clues to help you break free of your curse!

The demon hordes also leave behind useful items if you manage to defeat them. Use them to defeat future hordes.

You and your two companions won't be enough to defeat the hordes that get stronger with each passing night. Fortunately, you'll meet Kyubi, a demon fox, that's looking for a mate. Train her to be your loyal companion as she'll be a powerful ally in your fight against the horde.

Engage in romance with the foxgirl as well as your two elf companions. This may not only advance the plot but also lead to steamy scenes and offer unique rewards to help you in combat.

There's also a town that you'll be able to visit. The townspeople will have quests and maybe clues to help you break free of your curse!
data.short_description: Explore dungeons, craft items, and build up defenses. Most importantly, train the Foxgirl to be your loyal companion through discipline and positive reinforcement as you strive to break free from a deadly curse.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
